interruptionRecovery.precondition: A succeeded and B has one incomplete delivery
steps: terminate the worker and sidecar without graceful workflow completion
restart the same application identity and state store
wait for the durable workflow to complete
inspect normalized effects and workflow history
assertions: B may be delivered again but its effect count equals one
C starts only after A and B succeed
the terminal run state is succeeded

steps: register an alternate adapter for the same normalized request contract
run the provider substitution scenario with unchanged workflow data
compare normalized output, usage shape, and safe failure fields
assertions: workflow and MCP contracts are unchanged
no provider SDK object crosses the adapter boundary
